betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Euphemium§f is an extremely rare material with unique properties - second only to §bDineutronium§f.

§eObtaining:§f
• Rare drops from certain processes
• Can be produced through advanced nuclear methods
• Extremely valuable

§eUses:§f
• High-tier crafting recipes
• Advanced armor and equipment
• End-game component production

§c§4HANDLING:§f
Effects can be unpredictable - use with appropriate caution.

§aTip:§f Save your Euphemium for the most important recipes - it's difficult to obtain in bulk.
